title: Terraria Tool and Weapon Models
description: A resource pack which allows renaming of some items to change their appearance to items from Terraria.
body:
### Description
This resource pack allows renaming of some items to change their appearance to look like items from Terraria. All tool/weapon tiers are supported for all textures.

### Currently Featured Textures
```
== Swords ==
**Swords**
Ash Wood Sword
Bat Bat
Bee Keeper
Blade of Grass
Blood Butcherer
Blue Phaseblade
Bone Sword
Boreal Wood Sword
Breathing Reed
Cactus Sword
Candy Cane Sword
Copper Shortsword
Copper Broadsword
Ebonwood Sword
Enchanted Sword
Exotic Scimitar
Falcon Blade
Flymeal
Gladius
Gold Shortsword
Gold Broadsword
Green Phaseblade
Ice Blade
Iron Shortsword
Iron Broadsword
Katana
Lead Shortsword
Lead Broadsword
Light's Bane
Mandible Blade
Muramasa
Night's Edge
Orange Phaseblade
Palm Wood Sword
Platinum Shortsword
Platinum Broadsword
Purple Clubberfish
Purple Phaseblade
Red Phaseblade
Rich Mahogany Sword
Ruler
Shadwood Sword
Silver Shortsword
Silver Broadsword
Starfury
Stylish Scissors
Tentacle Spike
Tin Shortsword
Tin Broadsword
Tragic Umbrella
Tungsten Shortsword
Tungsten Broadsword
Umbrella
Volcano
White Phaseblade
Wooden Sword
Yellow Phaseblade
Zombie Arm
```

### Credits
All textures are from the [Offical Terraria Wiki](https://terraria.wiki.gg/wiki/Weapons).
